data.name: D3001_AStringCannotBeGeneratedFromThisValue
data.value: A string cannot be generated from this value

data.name: D3001_AttemptingToInvokeStringFunctionOnInfinityOrNan
data.value: Attempting to invoke string function on Infinity or NaN

data.name: D3010_TheSecondArgumentOfTheReplaceFunctionCannotBeAnEmptyString
data.value: The second argument of the $replace function cannot be an empty string

data.name: D3011_TheFourthArgumentOfTheReplaceFunctionMustBeAPositiveNumber
data.value: The fourth argument of the $replace function must be a positive number

data.name: D3012_TheReplacementFunctionMustReturnAString
data.value: The replacement function must return a string

data.name: D3020_ThirdArgumentOfTheSplitFunctionMustEvaluateToAPositiveNumber
data.value: Third argument of the split function must evaluate to a positive number

data.name: D3030_UnableToCastValueToANumber
data.value: Unable to cast value to a number

data.name: D3050_ReduceSecondArgMustBeFunction
data.value: The second argument of the $reduce function must be a function with at least two arguments

data.name: D3060_TheArgumentOfTheSqrtFunctionMustBeNonNegative
data.value: The argument of the $sqrt function must be non-negative

data.name: D3061_PowerFunctionResultOutOfRange
data.value: The power function has resulted in a value that cannot be represented as a JSON number

data.name: D3070_SortSingleArgRequiresStringsOrNumbers
data.value: The single argument form of the $sort function can only be used on an array of strings or an array of numbers

data.name: D3080_ThePictureStringMustNotContainMoreThanOnePatternSeparator
data.value: The picture string must not contain more than one pattern separator

data.name: D3081_ThePictureStringMustNotContainMoreThanOneDecimalSeparator
data.value: The picture string must not contain more than one decimal separator

data.name: D3082_ThePictureStringMustNotContainMoreThanOnePercentCharacter
data.value: The picture string must not contain more than one percent character

data.name: D3083_ThePictureStringMustNotContainMoreThanOnePerMilleCharacter
data.value: The picture string must not contain more than one per-mille character

data.name: D3084_PictureStringBothPercentAndPerMille
data.value: The picture string must not contain both percent and per-mille characters

data.name: D3085_MantissaMustContainDigit
data.value: The mantissa part of the picture string must contain at least one digit or optional digit character

data.name: D3086_PassiveCharacterBetweenActive
data.value: The picture string must not contain a passive character between active characters

data.name: D3087_GroupingSeparatorAdjacentToDecimal
data.value: The picture string must not contain a grouping separator adjacent to the decimal separator

data.name: D3088_IntegerPartEndsWithGroupingSeparator
data.value: The integer part of the picture string must not end with a grouping separator

data.name: D3089_ThePictureStringMustNotContainAdjacentGroupingSeparators
data.value: The picture string must not contain adjacent grouping separators

data.name: D3090_MandatoryDigitBeforeOptional
data.value: The integer part must not contain a mandatory digit before an optional digit

data.name: D3091_MandatoryDigitAfterOptional
data.value: The fractional part must not contain a mandatory digit after an optional digit

data.name: D3092_ExponentWithPercentOrPerMille
data.value: The picture string must not contain an exponent with percent or per-mille

data.name: D3093_TheExponentPartOfThePictureStringMustContainAtLeastOneDigit
data.value: The exponent part of the picture string must contain at least one digit

data.name: D3093_TheExponentPartOfThePictureStringMustContainOnlyDigitCharact
data.value: The exponent part of the picture string must contain only digit characters

data.name: D3100_FormatBaseRadixOutOfRange
data.value: The radix of the $formatBase function must be between 2 and 36. It was given {0}

data.name: D3110_StringCannotBeParsedAsTimestamp
data.value: The string "{0}" cannot be parsed as a valid timestamp

data.name: T2007_TypeMismatchWithinOrderByClauseAllValuesMustBeOfTheSameType
data.value: Type mismatch within order-by clause. All values must be of the same type

data.name: T2008_OrderByMustBeNumericOrString
data.value: The expressions within an order-by clause must evaluate to numeric or string values

data.name: T2009_TheValuesEitherSideOfTheOperatorMustBeOfTheSameDataType
data.value: The values either side of the operator must be of the same data type

data.name: T2010_ExpressionsMustBeNumbersOrStringsWithOp
data.value: The expressions either side of operator "{0}" must be both numbers or both strings

data.name: T2010_TheExpressionsEitherSideOfOperatorMustBeBothNumbersOrBothStr
data.value: The expressions either side of operator must be both numbers or both strings

data.name: T2011_TransformRhsMustBeObject
data.value: The literal value of the right side of the Transform expression must be an object

data.name: T2012_TransformDeleteClauseMustBeString
data.value: The delete clause of the Transform expression must evaluate to a string or array of strings

data.name: U1001_ExpressionEvaluationTimeoutCheckForInfiniteLoop
data.value: Expression evaluation timeout: Check for infinite loop

data.name: U1001_StackOverflowError
data.value: Stack overflow error: Check for non-terminating recursive function. Consider rewriting as tail-recursive.

data.value: Attempted to partially apply a non-function
